This allows developers, and agents themselves, to construct specific personas with the portability to move across different ecosystems without losing their behavioral integrity. As we move toward a world of "Agentic Workflows," AIEOS ensures that agents maintain consistent traits regardless of the underlying model. By treating personality as a deployable asset rather than a fragile prompt, we are providing the "DNA kit" for the next generation of digital entities.
